title: The Op Mod - Legacy Textures
description: The Op Mod - A Beginners Dream has been undergoing some Texture Changes over the Last few Releases. This Texture Pack brings the V 0.0.1 Textures back
body:
Step back into nostalgia! This texture pack brings back the **classic Op Mod** textures, giving it a true retro look. **Experience the old-school graphics** combined with the **overpowered gameplay of the mod** 
- **the perfect blend of past and power!**

  > This Mod Requires the OP Mod, otherwise no changes will apply

> This Texture Pack is **LICENSE LESS** ,you can do everything you want with it. I don´t have time to update it
